title: cephalaria uralensis subsp. multifida
intro: Cephalaria uralensis subsp. multifida, also known as multifid cephalaria or multifid goat's beard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, primarily for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of cephalaria uralensis subsp. multifida include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, cephalaria uralensis subsp. multifida is often used as a dried herb, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
